etymology.description: зөІ(зөІ) (sД«, "silk; thread") + иЁҖ(иЁҖ) (yГЎn, "speech") = thread moving through speech sounds -> phonetic expression
etymology.interpretation: The character дңҢ combines the ideas of thread and speech, conveying the concept of a structured or patterned speech, suggestive of phonetic elements or expressions. It is a unique representation relating threads and speech.
